name: tandem
description: An ambient AI coworker layer. Carries a capability OS you own (PM OS) out of the IDE and into Slack, your screen, and your browser — powered by the Cursor CLI, so it runs on any model.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tandem/core && npm run build --workspace @tandem/engine && npm run prepare --workspace @tandem/pm-os && npm run build --workspace @tandem/cli && npm run build --workspace @tandem/pip && npm run build --workspace @tandem/slack && npm run build --workspace @tandem/chrome-extension
scripts.pip: npm run build --workspace @tandem/pip && npm run start --workspace @tandem/pip

author: Sachin Gupta (@Sach1ng)
